scripts.generate: npm run generate:areas && npm run generate:places
scripts.validate: node --check script.js && node --check analytics.js && node --check place-detail.js && node --check api/hotpepper.js && node --check api/rakuten-travel.js && node --check api/places.js && node --check scripts/generate-area-pages.js && node --check scripts/generate-place-pages.js && node --check scripts/validate-site.js && node -e "JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('data/region-schema.json','utf8')); JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('data/genre-schema.json','utf8')); JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('data/place-schema.json','utf8')); JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('data/places/featured.json','utf8'));" && node scripts/validate-site.js
scripts.build: npm run generate && npm run validate
